description: Fix all Recharts 3.x type errors and runtime issues (timeout, realtime-health, DB index)

userStories.title: Fix Recharts 3.x TooltipContentProps in all chart components
userStories.description: All custom tooltip components use TooltipProps which no longer has payload/label/active in Recharts 3.x. Must use TooltipContentProps instead.
acceptanceCriteria: daily-sends-chart.tsx: Use TooltipContentProps instead of TooltipProps for CustomTooltip
daily-cost-chart.tsx: Use TooltipContentProps instead of TooltipProps for CustomTooltip
donut-chart.tsx: Use TooltipContentProps instead of TooltipProps for CustomTooltip
time-series-chart.tsx: Use TooltipContentProps instead of TooltipProps for CustomTooltip
userStories.notes: All 4 chart components use TooltipContentProps from recharts/types/component/Tooltip. Verified in codebase 2026-03-04.

userStories.title: Fix Recharts 3.x chart onClick and dot render prop types
userStories.description: MouseHandlerDataParam no longer has activePayload. DotItemDotProps has optional cx/cy.
acceptanceCriteria: daily-sends-chart.tsx: Fix onClick handler to use activeTooltipIndex instead of activePayload
daily-cost-chart.tsx: Fix dot render prop to handle optional cx/cy from DotItemDotProps
userStories.notes: daily-sends-chart uses activeTooltipIndex (not activePayload). dot render props use optional cx/cy. Verified 2026-03-04.

userStories.title: Fix donut-chart and time-series-chart formatter type mismatch
userStories.description: Recharts 3.x Formatter<number, string> now accepts (value: number | undefined). Custom formatters must handle undefined.
acceptanceCriteria: donut-chart.tsx: Fix formatter prop type to handle undefined value
time-series-chart.tsx: Fix formatter prop type to handle undefined value
userStories.notes: donut-chart and time-series-chart use TooltipContentProps with valueFormatter as optional (v: number) => string. No undefined crash. Verified 2026-03-04.

userStories.title: Fix realtime-health subscription loop
userStories.description: useRealtimeHealth subscribe callback is unstable due to state deps causing infinite re-subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: subscribe callback does not depend on health.workflowId or health.version in useCallback deps
Use refs instead of state values in subscribe deps to break the loop
Max retries error no longer fires on page load
userStories.notes: lib/realtime-health.ts uses healthRef + subscribeRef pattern. subscribe callback has stable identity (only workspaceId dep). attemptRetry calls subscribeRef.current. Loop broken. Verified 2026-03-04.

userStories.title: Increase fetcher timeout for heavy aggregate queries
userStories.description: 15s client timeout is too short for /api/dashboard/aggregate which runs 15 parallel DB queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Increase REQUEST_TIMEOUT from 15000 to 30000 in lib/fetcher.ts

userStories.title: Add event_ts database index migration
userStories.description: Missing index on email_events.event_ts causes slow queries in aggregate and daily sends.
acceptanceCriteria: Index covers event_ts column on email_events table
userStories.notes: supabase/migrations/add_event_ts_index.sql and 20251205_add_event_ts_index.sql both exist with CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY on email_events(event_ts). Verified 2026-03-04.
